---
title: "Ramana Botta"
image: profile.svg
about:
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 14em
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:ramanab@bosonmotors.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ramanabotta
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/RamanaBotta
    - icon: twitter-x
      text: X
      href: https://x.com/ramanabotta
---

<!-- PLACEHOLDER: replace this bio with your own details before publishing. -->

I'm a robotics engineer working on autonomous systems and electric mobility
at [Boson Motors](https://bosonmotors.com). I'm interested in perception,
controls, and the messy problems that show up when robots meet the real
world.

Outside of work, I write about robotics, hardware, and the occasional
side project on the [blog](blog.qmd), and keep looser, less polished
thoughts in [notes](notes.qmd).
